fields.title: Clean up mode removal references and docs
fields.description: After the implementation tasks remove modes from runtime behavior, lingering tests, prompts, tool descriptions, request-user-input copy, and documentation can still describe plan/smart/deep/rush as modes.
fields.design: Audit extensions/tau source, tests, prompts, docs, and backlog-facing guidance for prompt-mode terminology. Keep wording that describes smart/deep/rush as agent types. Update request_user_input guidance so it is not tied to plan mode. Remove mode prompt files and tests that only exist for /mode. Keep sandbox and autoresearch uses of the generic word mode when they refer to their own domain values, not prompt modes.
fields.acceptance_criteria: No user-visible tau prompt refers to /mode or plan/smart/deep/rush modes. request_user_input guidance remains valid without plan mode. Source references to prompt mode remain only as historical test names or are removed. Documentation directs users to the agent tool for smart/deep/rush behavior. extensions/tau gate passes.
